text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're looking pretty miserable.
Did you goof something up again?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah… I've been trying so hard not to,
but it never seems to work…

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've wanted to say this for a while, but can't
you think through your problems logically?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If we identify the nature of your blunders and
then run the numbers, we should be able to
come up with a fix.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-Oh, really? Well… let's see
what goof-ups I did recently…

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I fumbled with the seasonings when I was cooking and spilled all of them into the pot…

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
An insufficient static friction coefficient.
Put a non-slip pad under everything.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I slipped on a banana peel, and then as soon
as I got up, I slipped on the same peel again…

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hm, a continuity problem.
Find the pattern and you'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And one time during class, I was trying to pick
up a pen I dropped, but I fell down and took
the whole desk with me… Even the chair fell
over on my head…

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uhhh… I don't think my calculations can account for that one. I'll have to reevaluate the magnitude of the goof-up factor…
